title: Discocalyx papuana
taxonomy: Discocalyx papuana is classified within the plant family Ebenaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants that are native to New Guinea. The Ebenaceae family is part of the order Santalales, which includes other plant families such as Opiliaceae and Santalaceae. The order Santalales is a group of flowering plants that are mostly found in tropical regions. The classification of Discocalyx papuana is also supported by its unique characteristics and morphology.
